title: cereus keyensis
intro: Cereus keyensis, also known as the Dragon Fruit Cactus, is a species of cactus native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cereus keyensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Cereus keyensis can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried powder, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
